payoutChecklist.title: Valid live credentials
payoutChecklist.description: Connect Flutterwave v4 Client ID, Client secret, and Encryption key from your live dashboard. Capisum live payouts require live-mode credentials.

payoutChecklist.title: API transfers enabled
payoutChecklist.description: In Flutterwave, confirm API / direct transfers are enabled for your business. Contact Flutterwave support if transfer APIs are restricted on your account.

payoutChecklist.title: Correct transfer source selected
payoutChecklist.description: In Flutterwave transfer settings, select the wallet or funding source Capisum should debit for NGN (and other) payouts. Mismatched sources cause failed or rejected transfers.

payoutChecklist.title: All Capisum static outbound IPs whitelisted
payoutChecklist.description: Add every Capisum static outbound IP to the Flutterwave live IP allowlist. Payouts are submitted by the Capisum worker, so API-only IPs are not enough.

payoutChecklist.title: Sufficient wallet balance
payoutChecklist.description: Fund the Flutterwave wallet that backs your selected transfer source. Insufficient balance returns INSUFFICIENT_FUNDS.

payoutChecklist.title: Capisum webhook URL configured
payoutChecklist.description: Add the Capisum Flutterwave webhook URL in Flutterwave Settings → Webhooks, enable transfer events, and store your secret hash in Capisum.

commonErrorFixes.symptom: Request made from a non-whitelisted IP
commonErrorFixes.fix: Whitelist every Capisum static outbound IP in Flutterwave live settings (API and worker). Redeploy is not required after allowlisting if static egress is already enabled.
Top up the Flutterwave wallet tied to your selected transfer source, then retry the payout.
Confirm you pasted live Client ID and Client secret (not sandbox), then re-run validation in Capisum.

commonErrorFixes.symptom: Transfers rejected or creation failed without a clear balance error
commonErrorFixes.fix: Verify API transfers are enabled and the correct transfer source is selected in the Flutterwave dashboard.

commonErrorFixes.symptom: Payout stays processing after Flutterwave shows success
commonErrorFixes.fix: Confirm the Capisum webhook URL and secret hash are configured, and that transfer.disburse (and related transfer) events are enabled.
